name: signed_contract
input:
TRAVEL NURSE STAFFING AGREEMENT
Facility: Vanderbilt UMC, Nashville, TN
Specialty: Cardiac ICU
Term: 4 August 2026 through 2 November 2026 (13 weeks)
Position: Registered Nurse, 12-hour night shifts, 3 shifts/wk (36 hr guaranteed)
Compensation:
  Taxable hourly: $40.00
  Weekly housing: $1,500.00
  Weekly meals: $385.00
  Weekly travel: $250.00
  Sign-on bonus: $1,000.00 (reduced per amendment 7/28)
  Completion bonus: $2,500.00 contingent on full completion
Overtime: 1.5x base after 40 ($60.00/hr)
Cancellation: 48 hours written notice from either party. Bonuses forfeited on early termination by traveler.
Required credentials: BLS, ACLS, CCRN.

expected.cancellation_terms: 48 hours written notice from either party. Bonuses forfeited on early termination by traveler.
